mapper.sql: select i.investor_id, i.dept_id, i.investor_name, i.phone, i.status, i.del_flag, i.create_by, i.create_time, i.update_by, i.update_time, i.remark from fin_investor i
mapper.insert: insert into fin_investor(dept_id, investor_name, phone, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{deptId}, #{investorName}, #{phone}, #{status}, '0', #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.delete: update fin_investor set del_flag='2' where investor_id=#{investorId}
update fin_investor set del_flag='2' where investor_id in #{investorId}
